titleStmt.title: SII 10.98: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 98. (A.R. No. 119 of 1917.) ON A NANDI NĀGA PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF MALLIKĀRJUNA, PĀMULAPĀḌU, GUNTUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Undated.

summary.p: Refers to a gift of land made by Velanāti Rājēndra-Chōḍa and others to the temple at Pāmulapāḍu in the Koṇḍapaḍumaṭi country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti calamarttigaṁḍaḥ . paranṛpajīvā
paharaṇakarayemadaṇḍaḥ . sadguṇa
ratnakaraṇḍaḥ . kavijanaśiṣṭēṣṭavanajava
namārttaṇḍaḥ . Ēna kṣitīśvaravarēṇa
manīṣivārtthiḥ . puṇyāni ratnakalitātu
lajīvanāni saśvarddhivriddhimahitāni ci
raṁttarāni dattē samujvalayaśōlali
tōttamāni yesya sphuranniśitabhīṣāṇakha
ḍgadhārasaṁpūjitō vijayakanyakayā vi
bhāti nirbhbhinnavairi gajamastakapīṭhajā
tamuktākṣatōjvalakarāṁbujayā
raṇāgrē . sōyaṁ śrīvelanāṁṭigoṁkkanṛ
pati trailōkyadīpānkkura rttīvrājivraṇa
dāritārinikara ssaujasyaratnākaraḥ . svasti sa
mastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍa
lēśvara kulōttuṁggacōḍa goṁkkamahārā
jula priyātmajuṁ ḍaina rājēṁdracō
ḍerāju goṁḍapaḍumaṭilōni pāmu
lapāṭi yuttaradiśābhāgaṁbunaṁddu sa
rvvakāraparihāraṁbugāṁ beṭṭina datti
pāmulapāṭi samastaprajayiniṁ jōḍrā
junaku dharmmārtthaṁbugāṁ beṭṭina dēvara ni
vēdyabhūmi kha 2 gaṇēśvaruniki na 10
dēvataku na 10 sthānapati dāsajiyya
la manmaṁḍu mallajiyyala kha 1 na 10
śaṁkkubayyena 15 mrēkavāriki na 10 bra
hmapurulu koṁḍebhaṭlu kha 1 na 10 dāsebha
ṭlu kha 1 Annyabhaṭlu kha 1 Allubollebhaṭlu
na 10 muppanabhaṭlu kha 1

pāmulapāṭiṁ damavrittipai dēvaraku bolliraḍḍi dama tāta bhā
miraḍḍikiṁ damataṁḍri vōtiraḍḍikiṁ dalli vāsa
sānki dharmmuvugā nakhaṇḍadīpamunaku
ṁ beṭṭina goṟiyalu 55 vīnim jēkoni kēti
yabōyini paḍle dana putrānupautri
kamu nityamāneṁḍu neyi vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
Note:—The impression of Face B is missing. Consequently the reading given in the departmental transcript is adopted.
Digital edition of SII 10.98 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
